content.en:
Airplanes!!!

A drop of immeasurable blood was completely formed, marking that the Dragon Scale Overlord had officially stepped into the third stage of a high-level immeasurable life form.

At this time, his strength is constantly improving, and he is much stronger than himself before the breakthrough.

Then, after taking a moment to stabilize his realm, he immediately headed for the Void Whale Mountain.

"The Void Whale Overlord has traded with me many times before and after, and I have obtained a lot of Hailou Tianjin from him, so I have gathered enough Hailou Tianjin. It is said that the Void Whale Overlord also made transactions with other overlords, and the total amount of Hailou Heavenly Gold he took out was enough to make an overlord condense immeasurable blood. I concluded that he still had a lot of Hailou Heavenly Gold on him, which was enough for him to condense immeasurable blood. It's a pity that he hasn't recovered from his injuries yet, and he can't condense immeasurable blood, otherwise he will definitely break through before me!"

The Dragon Scale Overlord thought so.

Now, he is ready to find the Void Whale Overlord and snatch the Hailou Tianjin on his body, maybe he can snatch a large amount of Hailou Tianjin, as well as the secrets behind him.

In the past, he didn't dare to trouble the Void Whale Overlord, because everyone was at the peak level of the second stage, even if his strength was stronger, he didn't have the absolute certainty of killing the Void Whale Overlord, so he didn't make a move.

But now, he had condensed an immeasurable amount of blood, which was enough to easily kill the Void Whale Overlord.

Soon.

The Void Whale Overlord came to the Void Whale Mountain, but he didn't find the Void Whale Overlord.

"Where's your Void Whale Overlord?"

The Dragon Scale Overlord casually grabbed one of the guards of the Void Whale Mountain and asked.

"The master is gone, I don't know where to go!"

The guard hurriedly said.

"Absent?"

The Dragonscale Overlord frowned.

Immediately, he contacted the Void Whale Overlord, but he couldn't get in touch.

At this time, he knew that the Void Whale Overlord had obviously run away.

"Forget it, let's go back!"

The dragon scale overlord is gone, he didn't do anything to the creatures of the Void Whale Mountain, after all, if he really kills these creatures, he will completely offend the Void Whale Overlord.

When the Void Whale Overlord returns, it is very likely that he will already be a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

There is really no need to provoke such a great enemy.

......

Somewhere in the void galaxy, the interior of the dark void at the bottom of the river.

The Void Whale Overlord is hiding here, and this is one of his secret bases.

"The Dragon Scale Overlord has really come to me!"

The Void Whale Overlord secretly rejoiced.

After he learned that the Dragon Scale Overlord was about to condense immeasurable blood in the third stage, he ran here as soon as possible and let his elite disperse away.

In this way, even if the Void Whale Mountain is invaded, the loss will not be too great.

He knew that it was definitely not only the dragon scale overlord who was eyeing him, but the other overlords also wanted the Hailou Tianjin in his hand.

If he couldn't condense the immeasurable blood, then he wouldn't even think about returning to the Void Whale Mountain.

"I wanted to recover slowly, but now it seems too late. The hidden danger injury of burning blood can also be recovered with Hailou Tianjin, which probably requires dozens of Hailou Tianjin. Now in this situation, I can't give it up!"

The Void Whale Overlord immediately took out a quick piece of Hailou Heavenly Gold to repair his injuries.

After his injuries recovered, he slammed into the third stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform and condensed immeasurable blood.

"I don't know if that mysterious outsider will trade with me again, if I trade with me again, I will be able to get more Hailou Gold, and my cultivation speed in the third stage will be very fast in the future, maybe I will have the hope of becoming the top overlord of the Voidless Galaxy!"

As time slowly passed, the injuries of the Void Whale Overlord recovered quickly with the help of Hailou Tianjin, and it only took hundreds of thousands of years to completely recover, but it also consumed sixty-eight pieces of Hailou Tianjin.

Afterwards.

The Void Whale Overlord began to secretly collect other materials, and he had already collected almost all the auxiliary materials, just a little bit.

Soon after, he secretly collected them all, and immediately began to attack the third stage, condensing immeasurable blood.

Not long after.

Rumble!!!

This dark void was directly shattered by the immeasurable blood of the Void Whale Overlord, and the aura of the Void Whale Overlord permeated the surrounding territory and was soon exposed.

However, he had already completely condensed the immeasurable blood and stepped into the third stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform, even if his strength was not as good as the dragon scale overlord, he still belonged to the same level.

The Dragonscale Overlord can defeat him, but he can't kill him.

And he is now completely ranked among the many overlords of the Voidless Galaxy.

......

"Void Whale Overlord, that guy has broken through!"

The Dragon Scale Overlord vaguely sensed the aura of the Void Whale Overlord, and it was already the breath of the third stage, and he was at the same level as him.

Subsequently, one overlord after another came to congratulate the Void Whale Overlord, and the Dragon Scale Overlord also went to congratulate.

On the surface, everyone is still in harmony, as if there are no contradictions.

Somewhere in the Milky Way of nothing.

Ye Tian's human replica body has been in retreat here for a long time, and this is the nest he occupies here with the body of another voidless galactic creature.

This way, he doesn't need to transport the materials out, and he can practice in retreat without worrying about exposure.

Moreover, with the presence of the copy body, he can learn some information about the voidless galaxy from time to time.

For example, the information that the Dragon Scale Overlord and the Void Whale Overlord had broken through to the third stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and he had now learned about it.

Of course.

He is not short of Hailou Tianjin now, so he has no trade with the Void Whale Overlord, unless the Void Whale Overlord has something better in the future, then he will trade with them.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

The Voidless Galaxy was very calm, and the Hurricane Collar was also very calm, and nothing major happened.

And Ye Tian, after a long period of penance, consumed a large amount of Hailou Heavenly Gold, and finally raised the Infinite Body to the extreme realm.

Once it is raised to the limit realm, this is also the limit of the immeasurable body, and it can no longer be improved.

Rumble!!!!

With the help of another piece of Hailou Tianjin, the Infinite Body finally broke through the shackles and stepped into the extreme realm.

As a result, Ye Tian's flesh and blood body began to transform, and his physical strength skyrocketed.

"The strength has at least increased several times, my current strength should be comparable to or surpass the average third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, like the dragon scale overlord and the void whale overlord, the high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have just broken through, the strength should not be as strong as mine!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Infinite Body has been raised to the limit, and the main thing behind him is to condense the Infinite Bone and quench the Infinite Bone to the limit.

But on this day, a big thing happened in the Voidless Galaxy!
